message:
refactor: Remove unused declarations, change pub to private where not needed

- Remove unused genCycle alias from itertools_mod
- Remove unused genElementStruct from xml_mod
- Remove unused genHTTPStatus/genHTTPResponseType from http_mod
- Remove unused genCProfile from profile_mod
- Change genCopy to const (only used locally)
- Change genWriter to const (only used locally)
- Change genPackInto/genUnpackFrom/genIterUnpack to fn (not pub)
- Change genLoads/genLoad to const (only used locally)
